summary: WalletPage Phase 3 testing completed. All 17 backend tests pass. Frontend UI fully functional with 3 balance cards, expandable distribution cards with breakdown, contextual explanations, hold expiry dates, (vous) badge, and Connect status card with Dashboard Stripe button.

backend: GET /api/wallet/distributions returns enriched data with appointment_title
POST /api/wallet/distributions/:id/contest only works for no_show user
frontend: WalletPage loads with 3 balance cards (En attente, Disponible, Retirable)
Balance cards show correct pedagogical descriptions
Distributions en cours section appears with pending_hold distributions
Distributions passées section appears with completed distributions
Distribution card expands on click to show detail
Expanded card shows contextual explanation text
Expanded card shows breakdown (NLYT, Association, Organisateur with amounts)
Expanded card shows hold expiry date for pending_hold
(vous) badge appears next to current user's beneficiary line
Total capturé line shows correct sum
Connect status card works (Dashboard Stripe button)
Contest button NOT visible for non-no_show user (correct behavior)

verified_features.balance_cards: 3 cards showing En attente (49,00€), Disponible (0,00€), Retirable (0,00€) with pedagogical descriptions
verified_features.distributions_en_cours: Shows pending_hold distributions with 'En attente' badge
verified_features.expandable_cards: Click to expand shows full breakdown with contextual explanation
verified_features.breakdown: Shows NLYT (commission), Association, Organisateur (dédommagement) with amounts
verified_features.vous_badge: (vous) badge appears next to current user's beneficiary line
verified_features.connect_status: Shows 'Compte vérifié' with 'active' badge and Dashboard Stripe button
verified_features.contestation_visibility: Contest button only visible for no_show user during pending_hold (correctly hidden for test user)

mocked_apis.stripe_connect: MOCKED - Stripe Connect Express is in dev mode

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo distributions (1 pending_hold, 1 completed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: WalletPage Phase 3 fully tested. Key features: (1) 3 balance cards with pedagogical descriptions. (2) Distributions split into 'en cours' (pending_hold/contested) and 'passées' (completed/cancelled). (3) Expandable cards with breakdown showing NLYT/Association/Organisateur/Participant amounts. (4) Contextual explanation text based on status and user role. (5) Hold expiry date for pending_hold. (6) (vous) badge for current user's beneficiary line. (7) Contest button only visible for no_show user during pending_hold. (8) Connect status card with Dashboard Stripe button. Test user is organizer beneficiary, NOT the no_show user. MOCKED: Stripe Connect (dev mode).
